ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrel_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel observation */,
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the squirrel */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ages table */,
  "fur_color_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the fur_colors table */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the activities table */,
  "vocalization_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vocalizations table */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the interactions table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the observation was made (AM/PM) */,
  "hectare_squirrel_number" INTEGER /* Number of squirrels observed in the hectare */,
  "above_ground_sighter_measurement" TEXT /* Measurement of the squirrel's distance above ground */,
  "specific_location" TEXT /* Specific location description */,
  "other_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_vocalization_id FOREIGN KEY ("vocalization_id") REFERENCES vocalizations ("vocalization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_fur_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("fur_color_id") REFERENCES fur_colors ("fur_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_observations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare within the park or neighborhood */,
  "community_districts" INTEGER /* Community district of the location */,
  "borough_boundaries" INTEGER /* Borough boundary of the location */,
  "city_council_districts" INTEGER /* City council district of the location */,
  "police_precincts" INTEGER /* Police precinct of the location */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ages" (
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category (e.g., Adult, Juvenile, None) */,
  "age_description" TEXT /* Description of the age category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fur_colors" (
  "fur_color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fur color combination */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_of_primary_and_highlight_color" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fur_color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity set */,
  "running" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was running */,
  "chasing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was chasing */,
  "climbing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was climbing */,
  "eating" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was eating */,
  "foraging" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was foraging */,
  "other_activities" TEXT /* Other activities observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vocalizations" (
  "vocalization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vocalization set */,
  "kuks" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel made kuks */,
  "quaas" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel made quaas */,
  "moans" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel made moans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vocalization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction set */,
  "tail_flags" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel flagged its tail */,
  "tail_twitches" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel twitched its tail */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel approached the observer */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was indifferent */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel ran from the observer */,
  "other_interactions" TEXT /* Other interactions observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrels" (
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "unique_squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the squirrel */,
  "age_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ages table */,
  "fur_color_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the fur_colors table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squirrel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrels_fur_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("fur_color_id") REFERENCES fur_colors ("fur_color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrels_age_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_id") REFERENCES ages ("age_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., park ranger, researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public report */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sighting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the engagement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., report submission, comment, like) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagement_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "park_neighborhoods" (
  "park_neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each park or neighborhood */,
  "park_name" TEXT /* Name of the park */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("park_neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrel_health" (
  "squirrel_health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel health record */,
  "squirrel_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the squirrels table */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the squirrel (e.g., healthy, injured, diseased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squirrel_health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_health_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_efforts" (
  "conservation_effort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation effort */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the conservation effort */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conservation effort */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conservation_effort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conservation_efforts_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
